mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_order (group_id, me_id, selling_price, selling_time, remark, is_returned) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{meId}, #{sellingPrice}, #{sellingTime}, #{remark}, #{returned})

INSERT INTO wms_order (group_id, me_id, selling_price, selling_time, remark, is_returned) VALUES
(#{o.groupId}, #{o.meId}, #{o.sellingPrice}, #{o.sellingTime}, #{o.remark}, #{o.returned})
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.group_id, o.me_id, o.selling_price, o.selling_time, o.remark, o.is_returned AS returned, m.id AS m_id, m.group_id AS m_group_id, m.cate_id AS m_cate_id, m.cost AS m_cost, m.price AS m_price, m.imei AS m_imei, m.sold AS m_sold, m.created_at AS m_created_at, c.id AS c_id, c.group_id AS c_group_id, c.parent_id AS c_parent_id, c.name AS c_name FROM wms_order o LEFT JOIN wms_merchandise m ON m.id = o.me_id AND m.group_id = o.group_id LEFT JOIN wms_category c ON c.id = m.cate_id WHERE o.group_id = #{groupId} AND o.selling_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY o.selling_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_order SET is_returned = TRUE WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId}
